title: Verify both qualified adapters against golden fixtures
steps: Run the real PdfPig extractor and both explicitly registered adapters over every injected private fixture plus changed-layout, ambiguous, zero-movement, duplicate-tuple, date-boundary, and control-mismatch mutations.
expected: Exactly one adapter matches each qualified fixture; every record is accounted for; exact controls reconcile; identical tuples at different positions remain distinct; unsupported, ambiguous, changed, or unreconciled variants fail closed without LEDGER mutation.
